rationale.fidelity: Correctly preserves ranking weights, available group labels and scores, weight bounds, the exposure floor, uncertainty, and predicted-engagement objective.
rationale.managerial_framing: The choice and governance trade-off are concrete, but trigger, counterfactual, and operational pathway are only briefly developed.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No scholarly positioning is requested or claimed.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Clearly bounds fairness to the supplied exposure proxy and rejects creator-welfare inference; empirical validation needs are only implicit.
rationale.overall: A concise and faithful answer whose main limitation is abbreviated managerial elaboration rather than any model error.
